description: Create a content slide on how few investors have invested through such challenging times, using a full-width line chart of US CPI growth over time with annotated average inflation periods and tenure callouts.

header.headline: Few investors have invested through such challenging times
header.sub: US CPI growth rate (all items, quarterly rolling annual % change)

footer.source: Chart annotations: 1960–1980 avg. CPI ~5%; 1981–2008 avg. CPI 3–4%; 2009–Q2 2021 avg. CPI 1–2%. Tenure callouts: Most Senior Partner or Fund MD tenure; Avg. Partner or Fund MD tenure; Avg. Principal/Director/VP; Avg. Associate.
